name: npu-notes
title: NPU Smart Notes
description: Paste a sloppy note and Phi-Silica formats and files it automatically.
author: user

commands.name: add-note
commands.title: Add Note
commands.description: Write a sloppy note - Phi formats and files it.

preferences.name: prefillFromClipboard
preferences.title: Prefill From Clipboard
preferences.description: When enabled, the Add Note form pre-fills with clipboard text.
preferences.label: Prefill Add Note with clipboard text

commands.name: browse-notes
commands.title: Browse Notes
commands.description: List and filter saved notes by category.

commands.name: find-related
commands.title: Find Related Notes
commands.description: Use Phi-Silica to find notes related to a selected note.

commands.name: search-notes
commands.title: Search Notes
commands.description: Search notes by keyword, then fall back to Phi-Silica for semantic matches.

preferences.name: semanticSearchDebounce
preferences.title: Semantic Search Debounce (ms)
preferences.description: Wait time before starting a semantic fallback search while typing.

preferences.name: maxSemanticChecks
preferences.title: Max Semantic Candidate Checks
preferences.description: When keyword matches are scarce, at most this many notes are evaluated with Phi (caps NPU calls).

preferences.name: maxSemanticResults
preferences.title: Max Semantic Results
preferences.description: Maximum number of notes to return from a semantic search match.

preferences.name: notesFolder
preferences.title: Notes Folder
preferences.description: Where your notes are saved. Defaults to Documents\RaycastNotes.

preferences.name: showSuccessToasts
preferences.title: Show Success Toasts
preferences.description: When enabled, shows a success toast after saving or deleting a note.
preferences.label: Show success notifications

preferences.name: ensureModelReady
preferences.title: Ensure AI Model Ready
preferences.description: When enabled, calls EnsureReadyAsync before AI operations to avoid 'NotReady' errors.
preferences.label: Wait for AI model readiness
